query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white close-up image of a human face, likely a child's face, centered in the frame against a dark background. The visible features include eyes, a nose, and an open mouth. The tonal range consists of grays fading into deep blacks with some lighter midtones on the facial area.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred black-and-white close-up where a child's face dissolves into soft indistinct masses of gray, lacking any sharp detail in features or texture. The muted, desaturated palette and oppressive low contrast create a suffocating, melancholic atmosphere. The intentional blur obscures the child's expression into a ghostly smear, with the eyes and open mouth barely emerging from darkness, evading clear recognition and producing an unsettling, distressed mood.
